ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "asin" TEXT /* ASIN of the product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product's image */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the product is active */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "helpful" TEXT /* Helpfulness of the review (e.g., [0, 0]) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "sentiment" INTEGER /* Sentiment of the review (1 = positive, -1 = negative, 0 = neutral) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the review is featured */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., website, app) */,
  "review_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the reviewer */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the reviewer's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the reviewer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the reviewer */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the reviewer has submitted */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the reviewer joined the platform */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the reviewer is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category" TEXT /* Parent category of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the category is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, customer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the roles table */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Time when the user account is locked out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
